{{Infobox group
| name = Seven Calamities
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The Seven Calamities are the primary leaders of the [[D’Niss]], an alien race. They are considered the most formidable beings of their species, surpassed in power only by the [[Swarm-Queen]], [[Esh’kinaar]]. The group's objective was to accumulate sufficient energy to facilitate the summoning of their queen. Individually, these entities are incredibly powerful; engaging a single member would necessitate the combined strength of five [[Divine Titans]] or a [[Zenith Device]]. The group includes diverse members such as [[Neth’terith]], known as the [[Shadow]] Claw, who can produce clouds of parasitic mites, and [[Sel’miroth]], a small but dangerous hypnotist and spellcaster. Another member, [[Xarro’kesh]], is described as a massive three-headed ant. While the group once consisted of seven members, they were eventually reduced to a few survivors who hid within inhabited planets. Ultimately, [[Sel’miroth]] was the final remaining member, dying in a state of triumph as her mother arrived.}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The Seven Calamities are a category of powerful threats or events that includes the entity [[Sel’miroth]] and a fat beetle as its seventh member. Although most of these entities eventually departed from the universe, three surviving members were discovered within the same system as [[Esh’kinaar]]. Following these events, the final member of the group resonated through the [[Aether]] with a song of triumph.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Seven Calamities]] are a group of entities, the seventh of which is a fat beetle.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c7">''The Knight'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Seven Calamities]] are a group of entities that mostly left the universe.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c16">''The Knight'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Seven Calamities]] is a group that includes [[Sel’miroth]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Seven Calamities]] is a category of events or threats.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c31">''The Knight'', chapter 31</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Three surviving members of the [[Seven Calamities]] were found in the system where [[Esh’kinaar]] was located.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c34">''The Knight'', chapter 34</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Seven Calamities]] are powerful entities.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c39">''The Knight'', chapter 39</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The last of the [[Seven Calamities]] resonated through the [[Aether]] in a song of triumph.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c40">''The Knight'', chapter 40</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
